import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import './App.css'; import Terminal from './Terminal'; const App = () => { const [activeApp, setActiveApp] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { }, []); const handleBoxClick = (boxName) => { setActiveApp(boxName); }; let text = ''; if (activeApp === 'box1') { text = 'Sample text for Box 1'; } else if (activeApp === 'box2') { text = 'Sample text for Box 2'; } else if (activeApp === 'box3') { text = 'Sample text for Box 3'; } const box1Text = activeApp === 'box1' ? 'Scroll Down!' : 'About Me'; const box2Text = activeApp === 'box2' ? 'Scroll Down!' : 'Projects'; const box3Text = activeApp === 'box3' ? 'Scroll Down!' : 'Resume'; let content = null; if (activeApp === 'box3') { content = (

Nathaniel Marcellus

About Me

Marietta, GA 30064

nathaniel.j.marcellus@gmail.com

+1 678 748 7858

My name is Nathaniel but practically everyone calls me Nate. I'm 16 turning 17, and I love coding, socializing with people, and helping anyone who needs it. In my honest opinion, I'm an opportunist and I love trying new things to see what can help me out now to better my future later. I've also worked as an insider for Marco's Pizza, and after the very short time I've worked there, every manager I had has nothing but good things to say about me.

Authorized to work in the US for any employer
